message:
fix(tools): add NaN/Infinity input validation and regression guards to profile tuning harness

Hardens the profile tuning harness against non-finite floating-point values
that could propagate through benchmark pipelines and produce misleading
regression verdicts.

PolicyDelta.is_regression():
- Check is_finite() on both p99_encode_change_pct and p99_decode_change_pct
  before threshold comparison — NaN/Infinity now triggers regression

ProfileTuningHarness.evaluate():
- Add validate_inputs() pre-check phase before candidate computation
- Reject early with HarnessOutcome::Rejected if any baseline, benchmark,
  or previous benchmark contains non-finite metrics
- Add HarnessOutcome::Rejected variant to the outcome enum

validate_inputs():
- Scan baseline rows for non-finite overhead_ratio
- Scan benchmarks and previous_benchmarks for non-finite p99 encode/decode
  latencies and throughput values
- Produce RegressionDiagnostic entries with actionable field names

compute_deltas():
- Guard per-delta percentage calculations against division by zero and
  non-finite intermediate results

New tests:
- non_finite_baseline_overhead_ratio_is_rejected
- non_finite_benchmark_latencies_are_rejected
- policy_delta_regression_detects_nan_and_infinity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
